import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      if not inserted and x <= val
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, val)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = sorted.len()
  while j < m
    match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
